edges.evidence_quote: The club was reported to host prostitution and drug trafficking and the presence of members of Tren de Aragua and MS-13.
edges.context: Both groups were present at the same illegal night club, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: Venezuela's close relationship with Iran in addition to Hezbollah's alleged collaboration with the organized crime syndicate has also been cited as evidence by the Trump administration of collaboration with the Venezuelan government.
edges.context: Hezbollah is alleged to collaborate with Tren de Aragua, according to the Trump administration.
